title: taraxacum tanyolobum
intro: Taraxacum tanyolobum, also known as Tatarian dandelion, is a plant species in the dandelion genus Taraxacum, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and jagged leaves. The medicinal properties of Taraxacum tanyolobum include its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects, making it useful in treating digestive issues and reducing swelling. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to improve liver function, lower blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of arthritis and gout. Taraxacum tanyolobum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its roots and leaves can be used in herbal medicine.
